payload.input: That’s because she’s fifteen, Ethan, she’s barely been touched, and you’re the one getting to learn her first, you’re the one I’m letting inside her because you’ve been such a good boy, because you look at me with those eyes like you need me to feed you and fuck you and forgive you all at once."  Ethan makes a sound then, a wounded noise that vibrates in his chest, and Maya realizes he’s crying—not sobbing, but tears tracking silent down his flushed cheeks, his face contorted with the overwhelming reality of Vivian’s breast pressed against his arm, her breath in his ear, his fingers buried in his sister while the camera whirs and the money accumulates and his stomach cramps with a terror that only seems to make his erection harder, more insistent, bobbing against his stomach where his shirt has ridden up to reveal the smooth, hairless plane of a boy who hasn’t finished growing into his frame.
